description_long: This is a dark navy athletic shoe with a low-cut design and a white, thick, textured sole. The upper appears to be made of a combination of mesh and synthetic materials, providing breathability and structure. A white stylized 'X' logo is visible on the side, and the shoe features a standard lace-up closure with matching dark laces. The interior is padded for comfort, and the heel includes a pull tab for easy wearing. The overall build suggests it is designed for casual or light athletic use, suitable for urban environments.
description: A dark navy athletic shoe with a white sole, mesh upper, and a white 'X' logo on the side.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the mesh upper, lace-up closure, and padded interior.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the heel, pull tab, and side logo.
description_view_2: Side profile view displaying the white 'X' logo and the thick, textured sole.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the toe box, mesh ventilation, and lace arrangement.
attribute_logo: White stylized 'X' on the side of the shoe.
